snippets.snippet: The place to stay we need for traveling
Worth for that price with AC
But other than a great choice and hilghly recommended
Recommended dengan tempat dan pelayanan yang ramah
Clean and a good price room.
Staff was super polite and helpful.

address.address1: Jl. K. H. Agus Salim, Kel. Ie Meulee, Sukajaya, Sabang City

description.short: Conveniently situated in the Sabang part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options. This 3-star property is packed with in-house facilities to improve the quality and joy of your stay.

extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The experience of staying at this hotel was very satisfying. The room was clean and comfortable, the staff service was friendly and responsive. The atmosphere was calm, perfect for resting. Overall, highly recommended and I would like to stay here again.
comments.reviewTitle: Comfortable, clean, and the service is friendly.
comments.originalComment: Pengalaman menginap di hotel ini sangat memuaskan. Kamar bersih & nyaman,Pelayanan staf ramah dan cepat tanggap. Suasana tenang, cocok untuk istirahat. Secara keseluruhan, sangat direkomendasikan dan ingin menginap lagi di sini.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives: Many mosquitos in the night.. not sure if the property provides it, but I have my own repellent with me. Water was off in the morning, luckily they have tub in bathroom
comments.reviewPositives: Strategic location..comfy and clean room.. good value for money

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: With a price of 80 thousand, you get accommodation as good as this, fragrant room, friendly staff, even though the bathroom is outside, it is very clean.
comments.originalComment: Dengan harga 80rb dapat penginapan yang sebagus ini, kamar wangi, staff ramah, meski kamar mandi diluar tapi kamar mandinya bersih banget

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: A comfortable and clean place, located near the beach and strategically close to other tourist attractions, the staff is also quite friendly.
comments.originalComment: Tempat nyaman dan bersih, lokasi dekat pantai dan strategis dengan tempat wisata lainnya, staff juga cukup ramah

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Accommodation recommendations for the Sumur Iga area.
comments.reviewTitle: The accommodation is very clean, strategically located near the beach, and the receptionist is very nice.
comments.originalTitle: Penginapan sangat bersih, letak strategis dekat dgn pantai, resepsionis baik benar
comments.originalComment: Rekomendasi penginapan utk daerah sumur iga

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The place is clean, located close to the Three Wells tourist spot. The staff left their WhatsApp number on the table, making it easy to reach out if we need anything. I would stay here again if I go to Sabang. The price is as per the app we booked online.
comments.originalComment: Tempatnya bersih, lokasi dekat dengan tempat wisata sumur tiga. Staff meninggalkan nomor wa di mejanya, jadi gampang bila ada perlu sesuatu. Bakal nginap disini kembali, bila ke sabang lagi. Harga sesuai dengan aplikasi yg kita pesan secara online.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: I recommend staying here. The downside is that it's a bit far from some tourist attractions, but it's worth it anyway.
comments.originalComment: Rekomen yg mau nginap di sini. Minusnya agak jauh dari beberapa tempat wisata, tapi worth it juga kok.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Pondok Simpang 3 is budget-friendly, suitable for backpackers, with a comfortable, safe, and clean environment. The facilities are fairly complete, making it a great place to rest after a day of traveling.
comments.originalComment: Pondok simpang 3 harga ramah di kantong cocok untuk yang suka backpackeran tempat nya nyaman aman dan bersih fasilitas lumayan lengkap setelah seharian melancong terus istirahatnya di pondok simpang 3.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Suitable for family groups, friendly and good staff, large rooms, and the air conditioning is also cold. It's just that it happened to rain there, and many rooms have leaks, especially near the bathroom, which can be dangerous. I hope it gets fixed soon so it can be even better.
comments.originalComment: Cocok untuk rombongan keluarga, staf ramah, baik, kamr besar, AC juga dingin. Cuma  kebetulan pas hujan disana, banyak yg bocor kamarnya, terutama dekat KM kan bahaya, semoga segera diperbaiki biar makin top markotop

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
We stayed at Pondok for 9 nights and kept extending our stay because life on the island is so chill and enjoyable!
We liked the location because it’s really close to the city center, with many local restaurants nearby.
The room is okay—the bed is comfy, the facilities are basic but functional.
There’s AC, which works fine, though it doesn’t cool the room a lot.
If you need the receptionist, just text him on WhatsApp, as there’s usually no one around.
Free water is available.

I recommend this place!

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Great place and nice owner and stuff. Only downside is toilet seat is too low and small and no water spray. But other than a great choice and hilghly recommended

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: While the bigger hotel offer the economic room without the AC, this property more worth it with the price offer.. the only lacking is share toilet
comments.reviewTitle: Worth for that price with AC

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: My initial intention to book Freddie but no room available so I book 1 night with pondok simpang tiga....walking distance only. When you go out can only get reception to book thier becak or driver.. the price is higher than usual becak (that how I felt as I visited pulau weh 6 mth ago) , then we chartered this becak (Irvan) from pondok to sabang city 2 way for 50k, to iboih beach 150k..the terrible thing is we would like tonever grocery at sabang first before go in iboih, this becak driver promised with no additional cost later sent us straight to iboih said the same grocery can get at iboih..that was my biggest mistake by trusting him, we unable to get the same grocery we want at iboih, he then promised to help us buy later then never do it . Quite disappointing

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: top

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Clean and a good price room. Coffee and tea provided for the first day. Free water refill. Polite staff. Responsive owner.  Very basic tho and the ensuite bathroom has no ventilation so it’s a lil stuffy and smells a little. Squatting toilet, cold showers.
